\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4772 introduces Text Weak Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\hat{M}_{\\text{weak}} = \\hat{I} + \\sqrt{\\eta} \\epsilon \\hat{O} \\implies dr = \\sqrt{\\eta} \\langle \\hat{O} \\rangle dt + \\frac{dW}{\\sqrt{\\eta}}\n\\end{equation}
